Title: Software Quality Engineer (analyst)
Description: Experienced in supporting business requirements by enabling real-time data analysis for test and development teams. Proficient in Control-M, Putty, Mainframe, SQL, Power BI, Informatica PowerCenter, WinSCP, Excel, and Azure.  Skilled in monitoring and managing batch jobs using Control-M and ESP across SIT, UAT, and SVP environments. Strong knowledge of z/OS, JCL, COBOL, and debugging techniques. Automated Control-M jobs, improving process efficiency.  Hands-on experience in Power BI Desktop, Power Query, DAX, Power BI Service, and implementing Visual/Page/Report-level and Drillthrough filters. Built and published interactive dashboards with Row Level Security, Bookmarks, and Parameters. Worked with On-Premises Data Gateway to enable and schedule dataset refreshes across web and mobile clients.  Worked extensively on AMH Swift, conducting health checks, patching MT/MX messages, managing SNF queues, and handling SAG types and payment workflows. Collaborated with Azure teams on ETL using Data Factory, Lake Storage, and SQL Database. Performed data cleaning and ensured consistency and integrity using ADF and SQL.  Provided mentorship to junior staff and created documentation for knowledge transfer. Participated in AI training initiatives. Excellent in gathering, managing, and documenting business requirements. Strong communication and analytical skills. Proficient in Excel for supporting strategic analysis and decision-making.
